prompt: Review this GitHub Actions workflow for security issues

assertions.text: Identifies pull_request_target combined with checkout of PR head SHA as a code injection / pwn request risk
Flags write-all permissions as overly broad and recommends least-privilege
Catches command injection via ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }} interpolation in the run: block
Flags some-org/post-comment@main as unpinned (should use SHA or at minimum a version tag)
